---
title: "Havey Canyon Loop (55% Gravel)"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.83" data-elevation="2072.18" data-time="122" data-has-gravel="true">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.83</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2072.18 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:02</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.30 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">31%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>11.94</td>
      <td>63.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.32</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>1.96</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.26</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.04</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.30</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,176</td>
      <td>4.3</td>
      <td>40 ± 20</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Park Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Wildcat Canyon Parkway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>163</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>95</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Havey Canyon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>143</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Havey Canyon Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>58</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Havey Canyon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>240</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>6 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>198</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Nimitz Way: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>44</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>39</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>28</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,176</td>
      <td>18.9</td>
      <td>122 ± 44</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Park Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Wildcat Canyon Parkway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>163</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>95</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Havey Canyon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>143</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Havey Canyon Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>58</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Havey Canyon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>240</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>6 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>198</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>8 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Nimitz Way: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>44</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>4.3</td>
      <td>23</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>39</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>28</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>4.3</td>
      <td>25</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-havey-nimitz-meadow-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>10.3</td>
      <td>54.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>17.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>10.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>5.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>5.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>3.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
